description: Schema for an Amazon SES email message object defining the content structure including simple, raw, and template-based email formats.

Simple.description: The simple email message with subject and body content.

Subject.description: The subject line of the email.

Data.description: The content of the message subject.

Charset.description: The character set for the subject content.

Body.description: The body of the email message.

Text.description: The plain text body of the email.

Data.description: The text content of the body.

Charset.description: The character set for the text content.

Html.description: The HTML body of the email.

Data.description: The HTML content of the body.

Charset.description: The character set for the HTML content.

Raw.description: The raw email message in MIME format.

Data.description: The raw email message encoded in base64. The message must conform to MIME format.

TemplateName.description: The name of the email template to use.

TemplateArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the template.

TemplateData.description: A JSON string of replacement values for template variables.

FromEmailAddress.description: The email address to use as the From address for the message.

Destination.description: The recipients of the email message.

ToAddresses.description: An array of email addresses for the To field.

CcAddresses.description: An array of email addresses for the CC field.

BccAddresses.description: An array of email addresses for the BCC field.

ReplyToAddresses.description: The reply-to email addresses for the message.

ConfigurationSetName.description: The name of the configuration set to use when sending the email.

name: EmailMessage
